brand.name: ROBINS LUXE THREADS
brand.tagline: Curating elegance for the modern woman. Premium quality clothing that makes you feel confident and beautiful every day.
brand.heroTitle: Elegance Redefined for the Modern Woman
brand.heroDesc: Discover curated collections that blend timeless sophistication with contemporary style.

about.title: Our Story
about.description: Born from a passion for timeless elegance and modern design, Robins Luxe Threads is where sophistication meets everyday fashion.
about.whoWeAre: Robins Luxe Threads was founded with a simple vision: to make high-quality, elegant fashion accessible to every woman. We believe that what you wear is a reflection of who you are, and every woman deserves to feel confident and beautiful.
about.whoWeAre2: As a modern fashion startup, we carefully source and select products from trusted suppliers, bringing you styles that combine quality, comfort, and trend. Every piece in our collection is handpicked with attention to detail to meet our standards before it reaches you.
about.whoWeAre3: From timeless classics to contemporary trends, our collections are designed to suit the evolving style of today’s woman—without compromising on affordability or elegance.
about.whoWeAre4: At Robins Luxe Threads, it’s not just about clothing—it’s about helping you express your confidence every day.

values.title: Sustainability
values.desc: We strive to make fashion more responsible. We carefully select products from suppliers who prioritize ethical practices and materials, choosing pieces that are kind to both people and the planet.

values.title: Quality
values.desc: Every detail matters. We handpick items that meet our standards for craftsmanship, comfort, and durability.

values.title: Inclusivity
values.desc: Fashion is for everyone. Our collections feature a range of sizes—from XS to XL—designed to celebrate diverse body types and make every woman feel confident.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: We constantly evolve, curating collections that blend timeless design principles with modern trends to bring you fresh, exciting styles every season.

trending.title: Trending Now
trending.subtitle: Our most loved pieces this season

newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.desc: Subscribe to get exclusive access to new arrivals, style tips, and special offers.

aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: The pillars that define our brand
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Discover our latest collection and find your next favourite piece.

contactPage.title: Get in Touch
